result.summary: Current code passes the focused command, but the gate packet has a stale playbook export artifact bound as current evidence.
inspection_summary: Checked branch/worktree state, review request, gate artifacts, playbook export, changed exporter/tests/package/catalog surfaces, and ran the focused verification command.
Regression guard is currently reproducible: the requested focused node test command passed 6/6 tests.
Path surface coverage is not clean because the user-facing playbook export surface contradicts the current gate DAG.
inspection_evidence: git status --short --branch: codex/vibepro-local-playbook-templates ahead 1, no dirty files before and after focused test run.
.vibepro/pr/story-vibepro-bundled-playbook-templates/gate-dag.json: integration/e2e nodes mark playbook-export.json binding current, while the artifact is older and contains older gate statuses.
src/playbook-exporter.js: buildPlaybook uses new Date() for generated_at and writePlaybookArtifacts writes the requested --output path.
inspection_inputs: node --test --test-name-pattern 'exportStoryEngineeringPlaybook|bundled playbook catalog|playbook export CLI|fallback surface|package metadata and README|npm dry-run package' test/playbook-exporter.test.js test/vibepro-cli.test.js
judgment_delta: Initial concern: stale reuse marker might only require a fresh subagent review -> final: needs_review because the packet binds an older playbook export artifact as current integration/e2e evidence.
Command reliability concern -> reduced because the focused command passed locally without dirtying the worktree.
Path surface coverage concern -> confirmed because the generated playbook surface still reports older gate statuses while current gate-dag.json reports updated statuses.

findings.title: Playbook export artifact is stale but gate DAG binds it as current
findings.evidence: .vibepro/playbook/story-vibepro-bundled-playbook-templates/playbook-export.json has generated_at 2026-07-02T01:17:53.634Z and mtime 2026-07-02T10:17:53+0900, while verification-evidence.json records e2e at 2026-07-02T01:20:28.297Z and integration at 2026-07-02T01:22:44.814Z; gate-dag.json marks those nodes passed with binding.status current against that artifact.
findings.recommendation: Regenerate the playbook export after the latest e2e/integration run, then rerun pr prepare/gate DAG so artifact timestamps, generated_at, and binding evidence agree.

findings.title: User-facing playbook gate summary contradicts current gate DAG
findings.evidence: playbook-export.json content.quality_gates still includes older statuses such as gate:common_judgment_spine needs_evidence and gate:pr_scope_judgment needs_split, while gate-dag.json summary reports common spine passed and pr_scope_judgment_status passed.
findings.recommendation: Refresh the playbook export from the current gate DAG and verify the summary/report surface matches the canonical gate artifact before treating path_surface_coverage as satisfied.
